title: iberis contracta subsp. rifana
intro: Iberis contracta subsp. rifana, also known as Rif Mountain Candytuft, is a flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. It has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, and digestive issues, such as bloating and indigestion. The herbal preparations of Iberis contracta subsp. rifana include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to reap its health benefits.
